---
name: Good first issue (maintainer template)
about: Template maintainers use to open well-specified contributor tasks
title: "[area] Short imperative title"
labels: good first issue
---

## What

One paragraph: what to build and where it lives in the repo.

## Why

One sentence linking it to the roadmap / a functional requirement.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Specific, testable outcome 1
- [ ] Specific, testable outcome 2
- [ ] `npm run build` / `cargo test` passes

## Pointers

- Files to touch: `...`
- Types/interfaces involved: `...`
- Live demo section this replaces (if a web issue): link to the issue stub

## Out of scope

What NOT to do in this PR, to keep it small.
